examples: The property's oldest vintner just asserted his right to retire after working at Brane-Cantenac for over 32 years.
This YE VINTNER wine shows a nice deep ruby red colour.
You don't have to buy a vineyard to be a vintner or winemaker.
One of his tenants was Bill Owen, an experienced vintner who dreamed of starting a winery.
The result is a bright, fresh, full-bodied wine, which the vintner claims reflects the coastal breezes and the cool climate.
